title: Lapidarist
description: Chisel designs into your favorite resource blocks! Finally build the house of Diamond Blocks without the ugliness
body:
![banner](https://i.imgur.com/tdgBTvf.png)

![bar](https://i.imgur.com/pxH1n9F.png)

**Description:** Lapidarist is a relatively small mod that allows you to transform resource blocks which were mostly unusable, into blocks perfect for building. This includes blocks such as Gold Tiles, Cut Diamond, Emerald Pillars, and Netherite Bricks (the ultimate flex). All new blocks are only obtainable through a Stonecutter, giving it another interesting use besides more cost-effective stone block recipes. All blocks are also available from Crafting Tables but will have a lower output (similar to Copper).

![bar](https://i.imgur.com/pxH1n9F.png)

**Current Features:** As of latest release (3.0) this mod contains:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Iron: Tiles, Bricks, Cut, Pillar, and Chiseled
- Gold: Tiles, Bricks, Cut, Pillar, and Chiseled
- Emerald: Tiles, Bricks, Cut, Pillar, and Chiseled
- Diamond: Tiles, Bricks, Cut, Pillar, and Chiseled
- Netherite: Tiles, Bricks, Cut, Pillar, and Chiseled
- Lapis Lazuli: Tiles, Cut, and Bricks
- Coal: Tiles, Cut, and Bricks
- Redstone: Tiles, Cut, and Bricks
- Amethyst: Polished, Bricks, Pillar, and Chiseled

</details>

![bar](https://i.imgur.com/pxH1n9F.png)

**Misc Info and Planned Features:**
- Feel free to include this mod in modpacks (if you let me know I'll probably promote it)
- Glass and Copper variants
- _possibly_ raw ore block variants but not fully decided yet
- I will update to new releases but currently I have no plans to backport to 1.17 or earlier

![bar](https://i.imgur.com/pxH1n9F.png)
